case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. RENAN PIASSA DUQUE DA CRUZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RENAN PIASSA DUQUE DA CRUZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) REPRESENTATIVE ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $988.62 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DA CRUZ, RENAN PIASSA DUQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
